TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == U Yincumin ni Taywan == Yincumin han ni Taywan o sa'ayaway nu pairang a tumaru' itini Taywan a tamdaw. Adihay ku rurumay a kimad a mapasuwal kina taini a ciruma'. Tina pina a mihcaan anu duduhan kuya nicudadan nu kaw-ku-cha hantu yui-yuan-cha atu wen-ha walu a lebut a ayawho no pairang kita chiruma' tini Taywan saan. I aayaw no cecay atu pitu a eli' a mihcaan cangla tahni i Taiwan. Wu Austronesian ku ksasadakan nu mita a suwal saan ku micudaday atamdaw. Ira ku mahcaday a pikasadakan numita tu Philippine atu Malaysia hatu Indonesia hayatu Madagascar hantuya Oceania a tamdaw. Mafalic tu ku mita a orip anini a ira cangla itini Taiwan. Pataynien nangra ku tatii'hay a damak kitaan mafana ni wayku hantu nipapalu cangla. Ya ni kuannay a ceng-fu sapimangalay a nipacacay tu suwal nu mita. Falicen ku namoay a wayway suwal atu surit saan. Aninituhaw cicaytu ku suwal nu mita tulonghan namiay a suwal saan. Wu nimaramud hantu wu nipasafalic tu kuli ku sapinanam nangla ku orip mita.hansa malasawad a'min tu anini. Ira ku tusa a falu a suwal no ayaway a tamdaw i Taiwan. Mukteptu ku mapatayaytu lalima ku malamasawaday usawtu ku mangatatu a mapetek. Anini ku micudaday matiya wu kasadakan nu Austronesien a tamdaw saan, wu lemeltu kinian a makilimtu ku ayaway a orip. Naayaway a tamdaw ni Taywan mangalay ciluma' i lutuklutukan. I 中間 ku adihayay. Duduhan ka lakelal a patireng to niyaru'. Aniayaw ta hanini mtumes tuku lima patek ku alumna nu tamdaw. Aniniay a tamdaw anu nikilim tu niyaru' iraku maulahay tu lutoklutokan iraku maulahay in tu-chi. Caykahcad ku sapiorip hantu ku wayway nu mita tu pairing sa iraku tata'akay a atul nu orip fuwak sa i aayaw nu mita. Anu sau'sien ku awaay mikuli hatu micudaay nu mita tamdaw . mitaay ku karakaway tu pairing. I ayaw nu 1980 amihcaan. Adihay asiruma a tamdaw mikilimtu bangcalay a kuli hantu nipaluwad tu mitaay orip. kita ku ciluma'ay tiya saan i falucu'. Anini masapulungtu ku wayay nu mita chitihi'tu sirumaay a tamdaw. Yama matatudungay ladiw nu mita yuan-cu- min kapah mapacakay. Ya niyaro'ay a tamdaw malaluk ni paluwad ku wayway nu mita kuya ilisin hantu suwal. A'min kita I niyaro'ay yuan-cu- min maulah pacumud tu kuan-kangay kuli mi tungal tu sapiorip a paisu.
S.PHON: == o~u~u jinʦo~u~umin ni tajwan == jinʦo~u~umin ħan ni tajwan o~u saʡajawaj no~u~u pairaŋ a to~u~umaro~u~uʡ itini tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u ro~u~uro~u~umaj a kimaɬ~ɮ a mapaso~u~uwaɾ kina taini a ʦiro~u~umaʡ. tina pina a miħʦaan ano~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uħan ko~u~uja niʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan no~u~u kaw-ko~u~u-ʦħa ħanto~u~u jo~u~ui-jo~u~uan-ʦħa ato~u~u wən-ħa waɾo~u~u a ɾəb~b~vo~u~ut a ajawħo~u no~u pairaŋ kita ʦħiro~u~umaʡ tini tajwan saan. i aajaw no~u ʦəʦaj ato~u~u pito~u~u a əɾiʡ a miħʦaan ʦaŋɾa taħni i taiwan. wo~u~u ao~u~ustro~unəsian ko~u~u ksasaɬ~ɮakan no~u~u mita a so~u~uwaɾ saan ko~u~u miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj atamɬ~ɮaw. ira ko~u~u maħʦaɬ~ɮaj a pikasaɬ~ɮakan no~u~umita to~u~u pħiɾippinə ato~u~u maɾajsia ħato~u~u inɬ~ɮo~unəsia ħajato~u~u maɬ~ɮa*asʦar ħanto~u~uja o~uʦəania a tamɬ~ɮaw. mafaɾiʦ to~u~u ko~u~u mita a o~urip anini a ira ʦaŋɾa itini taiwan. patajniən naŋra ko~u~u tatiiʡħaj a ɬ~ɮamak kitaan mafana ni wajko~u~u ħanto~u~u nipapaɾo~u~u ʦaŋɾa. ja ni ko~u~uannaj a ʦəŋ-fo~u~u sapimaŋaɾaj a nipaʦaʦaj to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mita. faɾiʦən ko~u~u namo~uaj a wajwaj so~u~uwaɾ ato~u~u so~u~urit saan. aninito~u~uħaw ʦiʦajto~u~u ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mita to~u~uɾo~uŋħan namiaj a so~u~uwaɾ saan. wo~u~u nimaramo~u~uɬ~ɮ ħanto~u~u wo~u~u nipasafaɾiʦ to~u~u ko~u~uɾi ko~u~u sapinanam naŋɾa ko~u~u o~urip mita.ħansa maɾasawaɬ~ɮ aʡmin to~u~u anini. ira ko~u~u to~u~usa a faɾo~u~u a so~u~uwaɾ no~u ajawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i taiwan. mo~u~uktəpto~u~u ko~u~u mapatajajto~u~u ɾaɾima ko~u~u maɾamasawaɬ~ɮaj o~u~usawto~u~u ko~u~u maŋatato~u~u a mapətək. anini ko~u~u miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj matija wo~u~u kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u~u ao~u~ustro~unəsiən a tamɬ~ɮaw saan, wo~u~u ɾəməɾto~u~u kinian a makiɾimto~u~u ko~u~u ajawaj a o~urip. naajawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ni tajwan maŋaɾaj ʦiɾo~u~umaʡ i ɾo~u~uto~u~ukɾo~u~uto~u~ukan. i ** ko~u~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj. ɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uħan ka ɾakəɾaɾ a patirəŋ to~u nijaro~u~uʡ. aniajaw ta ħanini mto~u~uməs to~u~uko~u~u ɾima patək ko~u~u aɾo~u~umna no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. aniniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ano~u~u nikiɾim to~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ irako~u~u mao~u~uɾaħaj to~u~u ɾo~u~uto~ukɾo~u~uto~ukan irako~u~u mao~u~uɾaħaj in to~u~u-ʦħi. ʦajkaħʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u sapio~urip ħanto~u~u ko~u~u wajwaj no~u~u mita to~u~u pairiŋ sa irako~u~u tataʡakaj a ato~u~uɾ no~u~u o~urip fo~u~uwak sa i aajaw no~u~u mita. ano~u~u sao~u~uʡsiən ko~u~u awaaj miko~u~uɾi ħato~u~u miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaaj no~u~u mita tamɬ~ɮaw . mitaaj ko~u~u karakawaj to~u~u pairiŋ. i ajaw no~u~u **** amiħʦaan. aɬ~ɮiħaj asiro~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw mikiɾimto~u~u b~b~vaŋʦaɾaj a ko~u~uɾi ħanto~u~u nipaɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u~u mitaaj o~urip. kita ko~u~u ʦiɾo~u~umaʡaj tija saan i faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ. anini masapo~u~uɾo~u~uŋto~u~u ko~u~u wajaj no~u~u mita ʦħitiħiʡto~u~u siro~u~umaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. jama matato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj ɾaɬ~ɮiw no~u~u mita jo~u~uan-ʦo~u~u- min kapaħ mapaʦakaj. ja nijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maɾaɾo~u~uk ni paɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u wajwaj no~u~u mita ko~u~uja iɾisin ħanto~u~u so~u~uwaɾ. aʡmin kita i nijaro~uʡaj jo~u~uan-ʦo~u~u- min mao~u~uɾaħ paʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ to~u~u ko~u~uan-kaŋaj ko~u~uɾi mi to~u~uŋaɾ to~u~u sapio~urip a paiso~u~u.
S.FORM: == U Yincumin ni Taywan == Yincumin han ni Taywan o sa'ayaway nu pairang a tumaru' itini Taywan a tamdaw. Adihay ku rurumay a kimad a mapasuwal kina taini a ciruma'. Tina pina a mihcaan anu duduhan kuya nicudadan nu kaw-ku-cha hantu yui-yuan-cha atu wen-ha walu a lebut a ayawho no pairang kita chiruma' tini Taywan saan. I aayaw no cecay atu pitu a eli' a mihcaan cangla tahni i Taiwan. Wu Austronesian ku ksasadakan nu mita a suwal saan ku micudaday atamdaw. Ira ku mahcaday a pikasadakan numita tu Philippine atu Malaysia hatu Indonesia hayatu Madagascar hantuya Oceania a tamdaw. Mafalic tu ku mita a orip anini a ira cangla itini Taiwan. Pataynien nangra ku tatii'hay a damak kitaan mafana ni wayku hantu nipapalu cangla. Ya ni kuannay a ceng-fu sapimangalay a nipacacay tu suwal nu mita. Falicen ku namoay a wayway suwal atu surit saan. Aninituhaw cicaytu ku suwal nu mita tulonghan namiay a suwal saan. Wu nimaramud hantu wu nipasafalic tu kuli ku sapinanam nangla ku orip mita.hansa malasawad a'min tu anini. Ira ku tusa a falu a suwal no ayaway a tamdaw i Taiwan. Mukteptu ku mapatayaytu lalima ku malamasawaday usawtu ku mangatatu a mapetek. Anini ku micudaday matiya wu kasadakan nu Austronesien a tamdaw saan, wu lemeltu kinian a makilimtu ku ayaway a orip. Naayaway a tamdaw ni Taywan mangalay ciluma' i lutuklutukan. I 中間 ku adihayay. Duduhan ka lakelal a patireng to niyaru'. Aniayaw ta hanini mtumes tuku lima patek ku alumna nu tamdaw. Aniniay a tamdaw anu nikilim tu niyaru' iraku maulahay tu lutoklutokan iraku maulahay in tu-chi. Caykahcad ku sapiorip hantu ku wayway nu mita tu pairing sa iraku tata'akay a atul nu orip fuwak sa i aayaw nu mita. Anu sau'sien ku awaay mikuli hatu micudaay nu mita tamdaw . mitaay ku karakaway tu pairing. I ayaw nu 1980 amihcaan. Adihay asiruma a tamdaw mikilimtu bangcalay a kuli hantu nipaluwad tu mitaay orip. kita ku ciluma'ay tiya saan i falucu'. Anini masapulungtu ku wayay nu mita chitihi'tu sirumaay a tamdaw. Yama matatudungay ladiw nu mita yuan-cu- min kapah mapacakay. Ya niyaro'ay a tamdaw malaluk ni paluwad ku wayway nu mita kuya ilisin hantu suwal. A'min kita I niyaro'ay yuan-cu- min maulah pacumud tu kuan-kangay kuli mi tungal tu sapiorip a paisu.
S.PHON: == o~u~u jinʦo~u~umin ni tajwan == jinʦo~u~umin ħan ni tajwan o~u saʡajawaj no~u~u pairaŋ a to~u~umaro~u~uʡ itini tajwan a tamɬ~ɮaw. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u ro~u~uro~u~umaj a kimaɬ~ɮ a mapaso~u~uwaɾ kina taini a ʦiro~u~umaʡ. tina pina a miħʦaan ano~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uħan ko~u~uja niʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan no~u~u kaw-ko~u~u-ʦħa ħanto~u~u jo~u~ui-jo~u~uan-ʦħa ato~u~u wən-ħa waɾo~u~u a ɾəb~b~vo~u~ut a ajawħo~u no~u pairaŋ kita ʦħiro~u~umaʡ tini tajwan saan. i aajaw no~u ʦəʦaj ato~u~u pito~u~u a əɾiʡ a miħʦaan ʦaŋɾa taħni i taiwan. wo~u~u ao~u~ustro~unəsian ko~u~u ksasaɬ~ɮakan no~u~u mita a so~u~uwaɾ saan ko~u~u miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj atamɬ~ɮaw. ira ko~u~u maħʦaɬ~ɮaj a pikasaɬ~ɮakan no~u~umita to~u~u pħiɾippinə ato~u~u maɾajsia ħato~u~u inɬ~ɮo~unəsia ħajato~u~u maɬ~ɮa*asʦar ħanto~u~uja o~uʦəania a tamɬ~ɮaw. mafaɾiʦ to~u~u ko~u~u mita a o~urip anini a ira ʦaŋɾa itini taiwan. patajniən naŋra ko~u~u tatiiʡħaj a ɬ~ɮamak kitaan mafana ni wajko~u~u ħanto~u~u nipapaɾo~u~u ʦaŋɾa. ja ni ko~u~uannaj a ʦəŋ-fo~u~u sapimaŋaɾaj a nipaʦaʦaj to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mita. faɾiʦən ko~u~u namo~uaj a wajwaj so~u~uwaɾ ato~u~u so~u~urit saan. aninito~u~uħaw ʦiʦajto~u~u ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mita to~u~uɾo~uŋħan namiaj a so~u~uwaɾ saan. wo~u~u nimaramo~u~uɬ~ɮ ħanto~u~u wo~u~u nipasafaɾiʦ to~u~u ko~u~uɾi ko~u~u sapinanam naŋɾa ko~u~u o~urip mita.ħansa maɾasawaɬ~ɮ aʡmin to~u~u anini. ira ko~u~u to~u~usa a faɾo~u~u a so~u~uwaɾ no~u ajawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i taiwan. mo~u~uktəpto~u~u ko~u~u mapatajajto~u~u ɾaɾima ko~u~u maɾamasawaɬ~ɮaj o~u~usawto~u~u ko~u~u maŋatato~u~u a mapətək. anini ko~u~u miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj matija wo~u~u kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u~u ao~u~ustro~unəsiən a tamɬ~ɮaw saan, wo~u~u ɾəməɾto~u~u kinian a makiɾimto~u~u ko~u~u ajawaj a o~urip. naajawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ni tajwan maŋaɾaj ʦiɾo~u~umaʡ i ɾo~u~uto~u~ukɾo~u~uto~u~ukan. i ** ko~u~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj. ɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uħan ka ɾakəɾaɾ a patirəŋ to~u nijaro~u~uʡ. aniajaw ta ħanini mto~u~uməs to~u~uko~u~u ɾima patək ko~u~u aɾo~u~umna no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. aniniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ano~u~u nikiɾim to~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ irako~u~u mao~u~uɾaħaj to~u~u ɾo~u~uto~ukɾo~u~uto~ukan irako~u~u mao~u~uɾaħaj in to~u~u-ʦħi. ʦajkaħʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u sapio~urip ħanto~u~u ko~u~u wajwaj no~u~u mita to~u~u pairiŋ sa irako~u~u tataʡakaj a ato~u~uɾ no~u~u o~urip fo~u~uwak sa i aajaw no~u~u mita. ano~u~u sao~u~uʡsiən ko~u~u awaaj miko~u~uɾi ħato~u~u miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaaj no~u~u mita tamɬ~ɮaw . mitaaj ko~u~u karakawaj to~u~u pairiŋ. i ajaw no~u~u **** amiħʦaan. aɬ~ɮiħaj asiro~u~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw mikiɾimto~u~u b~b~vaŋʦaɾaj a ko~u~uɾi ħanto~u~u nipaɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u~u mitaaj o~urip. kita ko~u~u ʦiɾo~u~umaʡaj tija saan i faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ. anini masapo~u~uɾo~u~uŋto~u~u ko~u~u wajaj no~u~u mita ʦħitiħiʡto~u~u siro~u~umaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. jama matato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj ɾaɬ~ɮiw no~u~u mita jo~u~uan-ʦo~u~u- min kapaħ mapaʦakaj. ja nijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maɾaɾo~u~uk ni paɾo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u wajwaj no~u~u mita ko~u~uja iɾisin ħanto~u~u so~u~uwaɾ. aʡmin kita i nijaro~uʡaj jo~u~uan-ʦo~u~u- min mao~u~uɾaħ paʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ to~u~u ko~u~uan-kaŋaj ko~u~uɾi mi to~u~uŋaɾ to~u~u sapio~urip a paiso~u~u.
